# Auto-Generated Methods Documentation\n\n## Invoke-SourceDigestionOrchestratorAuto\n\n- **Source File:** SourceDigestionOrchestrator\n- **Generated:** 2026-01-23T23:37:05.8824899-05:00\n- **Purpose:** Auto-generated stub for manifest reverse engineering.\n\n```powershell\n# Auto-generated method for SourceDigestionOrchestrator (PowerShell)\nfunction Invoke-SourceDigestionOrchestratorAuto {\n    [CmdletBinding()]\n    param()\n\n    Write-Host 'Executing SourceDigestionOrchestrator for manifest reverse engineering.'\n\n    # Security validation logic\n    $securityConfigPath = "D:/lazy init ide/config/security.json"\n    if (!(Test-Path $securityConfigPath)) {\n        Write-Error "Security configuration file not found at $securityConfigPath"\n        return "error"\n    }\n\n    $securityConfig = Get-Content -Path $securityConfigPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n    Write-Host "Security configuration loaded successfully."\n\n    # Validate security settings\n    if ($securityConfig.enforceTLS -ne $true) {\n        Write-Warning "TLS enforcement is not enabled. Enabling it now."\n        $securityConfig.enforceTLS = $true\n        $securityConfig | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -Path $securityConfigPath\n        Write-Host "TLS enforcement enabled."\n    }\n\n    Write-Host "Test-Security-Settings-Fix completed successfully."\n    return "success"\n}\n\n```\n
